whats_working: Claude Code Skills Pack: Codebase Onboarding Docs has 17 total downloads — only product with real traction.
Free positioning has removed purchase friction, which is the right move early on to validate demand.
Onboarding and engineering workflow topics show the most natural product-market fit based on download data.
what_to_fix: No Reddit activity at all — zero posts, zero comments. Without traffic sources, nothing else matters right now.
37 products live but only 1 has any downloads. Catalog breadth is hurting focus — pick 3 to push hard.
8 paid products at $5 have zero sales. Paid listings with no free version and no audience will not convert.
Product titles are descriptive but not problem-led. Rewrite them to lead with the pain, not the deliverable.
